response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no experience with Linux kernel modification, no familiarity with embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C programming experience in UNIX/embedded context as required
No demonstrated knowledge of embedded network security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
